title: 🔬 Undergraduate Researcher at Biological Data Science Lab
body: Working as a TÜBİTAK Undergraduate Researcher under Prof. Dr. Tunca Doğan at Hacettepe University. Adapting state-of-the-art LLMs to protein generation.

title: 💼 AI Engineering Intern at nanominds
body: Researched AI workflows in Venture Capital and analyzed AI use cases across the investment process.

title: ✏️ Part-Time Art Instructor at AYBU
body: Taught students the fundamentals of pencil drawing — perspective to anatomical sketches.

title: 🚀 AI Team Lead at BİLTEK AI & Zenith AI
body: Founded Zenith AI competition team and led the TEKNOFEST 2025 AI in Aviation challenge — built YOLO + ORB visual odometry for flying cars.

title: 💻 Computer Engineering at AYBU
body: Transferred to Computer Engineering at Ankara Yıldırım Beyazıt University, fulfilling a childhood dream.

title: 🦷 Dropped Out of Dentistry to Pursue Engineering
body: Made the radical decision to leave dentistry after two years to follow my true passion in engineering and technology.
